name: Conqueror Bowling Center Management API
what_it_does: Conqueror (by QubicaAMF) REST API for bowling center management and point-of-sale system. Enables AI agents to manage lane availability and reservation booking, handle shoe rental and scoring system integration, process food and beverage POS transactions, manage league and tournament scheduling, access membership and loyalty program data, retrieve revenue analytics across all revenue centers, handle birthday and event party bookings, and integrate bowling center data with marketing and CRM systems.
use_cases: Managing lane reservations and availability from bowling center operations agents
Processing POS transactions for bowling, F&B, and retail from billing agents
Managing league scheduling and scoring from tournament management agents
Accessing revenue analytics across revenue centers from business intelligence agents
not_for: Non-bowling family entertainment centers without lane-based operations
Golf or mini-golf without bowling center-specific lane management
Fitness facilities without entertainment and social bowling focus
best_when: A bowling center or entertainment venue using Conqueror wants AI agents to automate lane reservations, POS operations, league management, and revenue analytics.
avoid_when: FINANCIAL RISK: Bowling center revenue management includes prepaid packages, league deposits, and event bookings. Payment automation must handle refunds and cancellation policies correctly.

auth.notes: Conqueror uses API key authentication. Venue-level credentials. No granular scope control. Limited public developer documentation. Integration primarily via partner program. Part of QubicaAMF global bowling equipment ecosystem.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — bowling center enterprise pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-center licensing; enterprise pricing for multi-location bowling chains
pricing.notes: Bologna, Italy. QubicaAMF is the global bowling equipment and technology company (merger of US-based AMF Bowling and Italian-based Qubica). Conqueror is their management software product. Used globally in bowling centers. Dominant global bowling technology provider.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; contact for specifics

known_agent_gotchas: FINANCIAL RISK: Bowling package and event payment automation must handle cancellation policies
No public MCP server — API key with limited documentation
No webhooks — polling required for lane availability updates
No granular scopes — API key grants full center access
Global product — documentation may be in multiple languages
Scoring system integration (Sync, Vector Q) is separate from POS API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Bowling center customer and payment data. PCI-DSS, GDPR. API key only. US/EU data residency. Limited documentation.

security_score_components.security_notes: Customer and payment data. PCI-DSS, GDPR. API key only. US/EU data residency.
